prompt: Apply Van Gogh’s style only to the distant background areas of the source romantic painting.
prompt_refined: Edit Image 1, "The Lady of Shalott," by applying the artistic style of Van Gogh exclusively to its distant background elements. The style transfer should be confined to the areas within Image 1 that correspond to the darkest regions in Image 2 (the provided depth map), ensuring the foreground subjects, including the lady, her boat, and immediate surroundings, retain their original style.
objects: Lady of Shalott in original artistic style
Foreground water in original artistic style
Foreground reeds and vegetation in original artistic style
Distant background trees and forest in Van Gogh artistic style
Distant background water in Van Gogh artistic style
Distant background sky in Van Gogh artistic style
